lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: docs-worker must read the full service class (not just policy/helper classes) before documenting lifecycle methods and cross-module seams. The invoice.md packet's inaccuracies stem from reading InvoiceSettlementPolicy but not InvoiceService in full.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-commercial-invoice-lifecycle-finance-hosts fabricated InvoiceService.settleInvoice() and AccountingFacade.postPaymentJournal() because InvoiceService.java was not read in full during the documentation session.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add invoice-specific enum values to .factory/library/ to help workers avoid confusing sales vs invoice statuses
rejectedObservations.reason: This would create a maintenance burden — the canonical packet (docs/modules/invoice.md) should itself be the truth source once fixed. Adding library entries for every enum is not scalable.
